intro: Hieracium macrocentrum, commonly known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium macrocentrum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, hawkweed is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
